title: Burning Block TFC
description: TFC compat for the mod that makes fire mechanics more believable!
body:
# Burning Block TFC

**Burning Block TFC** is the Terrafirmacraft compatibility mod for **Burning Block** a mod that makes fire leave a mark on the world!

![Two burned down trees on the a flat terrace with a forest in the background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc45314c70d049c10b51ea18c3a1bcf492f5f870_0.webp)

**Burning Block** is made with modpack and datapack devs in mind: featuring datapack support. Many of the mod's block conversions are controlled by block tags and Neoforge data maps. There is a basic [Wiki](https://github.com/Gourmandd/Burning-Block/wiki).

# Compatibility

- Recipes were changed to use lumber.
- Ash piles drop wood ash from TFC.
- For general mod compatibility see the mod page for Burning Block.
